title: Companies Pay Record Dividends in 2022 Despite Dismal Year
text: S&P 500 stocks paid $565 billion in 2022, up 10% from 2021

title: 4 Stocks to Watch on Dividend Hikes at the Turn of the Year
text: Lamb Weston Holdings, Inc. (LW), Sandstorm Gold Ltd. (SAND), Graco Inc. (GGG) and The Mosaic Company (MOS) recently hiked dividends.

title: 4 Stocks to Watch on Dividend Hikes Before 2022 Comes to a Close
text: Sandstorm Gold Ltd. (SAND), The Mosaic Company (MOS), The Ensign Group, Inc. (ENSG) and Preferred Bank (PFBC) recently hiked dividends.

title: The 7 Best Commodity Stocks to Buy for 2023
text: While the business news cycle tends to focus on the latest technological innovations, it's important to consider the best commodity stocks to buy for 2023 as these companies undergird said advancements. As recent geopolitical flashpoints demonstrated, access to critical resources is just as important as the end products they help facilitate.

title: This Bull Case In Fertilizers Is Serious: Buying CF Industries And Mosaic In 2023
text: I start by explaining the seriousness of the ongoing fertilizer bull case. Fertilizers made it possible to feed 8 billion people. Now that ability is under pressure. While fertilizer futures and stocks have run into resistance due to demand fears, 2023 is shaping up to be a bullish year for demand as supply remains constrained.

title: Mosaic: Food Prices Up, But Farmers Don't Want Fertilizer
text: Mosaic's cut back on potash production at Colonsay. What does this actually mean for shareholders? Phosphate and potash prices are coming down. Will farmers return to buy fertilizer?
